description: Inventory of product-related selectors and recommendations for canonical hooks.

representativeLocations.store_pages: pages/store/*.html — multiple product articles with data-sku/data-image and add-to-cart forms (e.g., pages/store/artisan-blends.html, pages/store/balms.html, pages/store/accessories.html)
representativeLocations.products_json: assets/js/data/products.json — canonical product data used elsewhere
representativeLocations.generate_script: scripts/generate-products.js — extracts data-price/data-sku/data-image when producing templates
representativeLocations.cart_init: assets/js/modules/cart-init.js — reads dataset.price/value and form inputs; sensitive to selector changes
representativeLocations.cart_ui: assets/js/modules/cartUI.js — updates cart UI based on product SKUs and prices

findings.consistent_data_attributes: Most product articles use `data-sku` and `data-image` consistently across store pages.
findings.price_markup: Multiple pages use `data-price` on option inputs and fallback parsing in generate-products.js — keep `data-price` canonical.
findings.add-to-cart_variants: Forms use `form.add-to-cart` or `form.product-options.add-to-cart` and submit buttons have class `add-to-cart` — treat these as canonical triggers.
findings.dynamic_parsing: scripts/generate-products.js contains regex-based fallbacks to find prices and SKUs; refactor carefully if changing template structure.

canonical_hooks: Use `data-sku` on product container (article.product) as the primary identifier.
Use `data-image` for the product's primary image URL.
Keep `data-price` on option inputs or variant elements — update `cart-init.js` only after verifying selectors.
Ensure add-to-cart forms include `class="add-to-cart"` and a submit button with class `add-to-cart` so modules can delegate safely.
migration_steps: Audit all `article.product` elements and ensure `data-sku`/`data-image` present — scripts/generate-products.js already expects these.
Update `assets/js/modules/cart-init.js` to derive SKU via `closest('article[data-sku]')` instead of fragile selectors where practical.
Add `data-product` or `data-product-id` attributes only if necessary; prefer existing `data-sku` for compatibility.
Create automated smoke tests (see Batch 7) for add-to-cart flows after changes.
